text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Japanese Derby has<n>finally
arrived, and<n>Matikanefukukitaru burns with
eagerness.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Always in her element to ward off evil<n>spirits,
Matikanefukukitaru is<n>confident that this monster
of a Derby<n>will not overwhelm her.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She heads to the track determined to<n>push herself
to her limits.
